B

build() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolConfig.Builder
Builds the ThreadPoolConfig instance.
builder() - Static method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolConfig
Creates a new builder for constructing thread pool configurations.
Builder() - Constructor for class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolConfig.Builder
 

C

close() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ManagedThreadPool
 
corePoolSize(int) - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolConfig.Builder
Sets the core pool size.

D

defaultConfig() - Static method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolConfig
Creates a thread pool configuration with default settings.

E

execute(Runnable) - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ManagedThreadPool
Executes the given command at some time in the future.

G

getActiveThreads() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolStats
Returns the number of threads currently executing tasks.
getApplicationId() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ManagedThreadPool
Returns the application ID associated with this thread pool.
getCompletedTasks() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolStats
Returns the total number of tasks that have completed execution.
getCorePoolSize() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolConfig
Returns the minimum number of threads to keep in the pool.
getCorePoolSize() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolStats
Returns the configured core pool size.
getKeepAliveTimeSeconds() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolConfig
Returns the time that excess idle threads wait before terminating.
getMaximumPoolSize() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolStats
Returns the configured maximum pool size.
getMaxPoolSize() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolConfig
Returns the maximum number of threads allowed in the pool.
getPoolSize() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolStats
Returns the current number of threads in the pool.
getQueueCapacity() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolConfig
Returns the maximum number of tasks that can be queued for execution.
getQueuedTasks() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolStats
Returns the number of tasks waiting in the queue for execution.
getStats() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ManagedThreadPool
Returns current statistics for this thread pool, including active thread count, completed task count, queue size, and pool size information.

I

isShutdown() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ManagedThreadPool
Returns true if this executor has been shut down.
isTerminated() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ManagedThreadPool
Returns true if all tasks have completed following shut down.

K

keepAliveTimeSeconds(long) - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolConfig.Builder
Sets the keep-alive time for excess idle threads.

M

ManagedThreadPool - Class in org.flossware.jthreadpool
Managed thread pool for an application.
ManagedThreadPool(String, ThreadPoolConfig) - Constructor for class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ManagedThreadPool
Creates a new managed thread pool for the specified application.
maxPoolSize(int) - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolConfig.Builder
Sets the maximum pool size.

O

org.flossware.jthreadpool - package org.flossware.jthreadpool
 

Q

queueCapacity(int) - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolConfig.Builder
Sets the task queue capacity.

S

shutdown() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ManagedThreadPool
Initiates an orderly shutdown in which previously submitted tasks are executed, but no new tasks will be accepted.
shutdownNow() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ManagedThreadPool
Attempts to stop all actively executing tasks and halts the processing of waiting tasks.
submit(Runnable) - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ManagedThreadPool
Submits a Runnable task for execution.
submit(Callable<T>) - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ManagedThreadPool
Submits a value-returning task for execution.

T

ThreadPoolConfig - Class in org.flossware.jthreadpool
Configuration for application thread pool.
ThreadPoolConfig.Builder - Class in org.flossware.jthreadpool
Builder for constructing ThreadPoolConfig instances.
ThreadPoolStats - Class in org.flossware.jthreadpool
Snapshot of thread pool statistics at a point in time.
ThreadPoolStats(int, long, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolStats
Constructs a new thread pool statistics snapshot.
toString() - Method in class org.flossware.jthreadpool.ThreadPoolStats
